title: Battle Grid, Manual Mode & 100-Class Rebalance
summary: The battle grid gets a full zone-based layout overhaul with sprites sized to fit adjacent columns. Manual combat mode ships alongside a comprehensive balance pass covering all 100 classes.

title: Cloud Saves, UI Unification & a Balance Pass
summary: 99 milestones since the fast-travel overhaul: cloud saves, telemetry with consent gating, UI unification across five screens, NPC art pipeline maturity, the M350 balance pass that smoothed Acts 5-6, Image Review V2 launch, and shared design tokens.

title: M313 Dev Diary: News Pipeline, Asset Snapshots & Release Tooling
summary: M313 wires up four infrastructure features: a public/news/ content pipeline with a Latest News widget, versioned asset snapshots per milestone, changelog category tags in release.sh, and backward-compatibility notes surfaced in the What's New splash.

title: Sets and Uniques System: Full Item Tier Overhaul in M305
summary: M305 shipped 24 set items (12 two-piece Sigon-style, 8 mid three-piece, 4 endgame four/five-piece), 24 unique items across 5 acts, 40 new affixes, and legendary mechanical effects with onCrit/onKill/onCast/onCombatStart hooks.

title: Infinite Depths: Endless Dungeon Mode Ships in M306
summary: M306 introduced Infinite Run mode — a procedurally scaled endless dungeon that ramps difficulty every 5 floors, awards exclusive affixes, and persists a personal best score across sessions.

title: M302 Gameplay Batch: Companion Sync, Flee Mechanic & New Rogue Skills
summary: M302 landed companion level-sync, a DEX-check flee mechanic, two new Rogue skills (Pilfer Magic and Hemorrhage), Warlock Soul Curse with curse-spread, skill-check map nodes, and a full node-overlay system for merchant, minigame, and bandit encounters.

title: Fast-Travel Overhaul, Questline & Difficulty
summary: Forty-plus milestones rolled up: 6 new towns, always-visible Return-to-Town, Silas/Kaela/Marek 5-act main quest, Normal/Hard difficulty, Loot Chests, Magic Find, Attack Speed runtime, 27 gender variants, 5 data catalogs, sprite-approval to in-game sync bridge, and a dragon epilogue.

title: Site SEO & Restructure
summary: Game moved to /play.html, new marketing homepage, canonical URLs, sitemap, llms.txt, OG/Twitter cards, and schema.org VideoGame markup.

title: 20 Classes, 84 Skills & Combat Rework
summary: 20 hero classes, 84 skills, 10 companions, combat rebalance, 60+ SFX — a comprehensive look at the Emberveil journey so far.

title: Character Art Pipeline & Consistency
summary: Full visual overhaul using SpriteCook's HD portrait and sprite pipeline — 20 hero classes, 10 companions, and boss art all regenerated.

title: OpenAI Pixel Art & SFX Loudness Pass
summary: Milestone 79 brought a sweeping UI redesign, refined combat feedback, and the new portrait-based character display system.

title: Combat DPS & Healing Analysis
summary: Community survey on the M77 combat rebalance — burst vs sustain, target falloff, affix reshuffle.

title: Interactive Tap Combat System
summary: Design document for the tap-to-attack weapons system — how real-time input layers on top of the turn-based combat loop.

title: Monte Carlo Combat Testing
summary: Complete rewrite of the combat simulator with formula transparency, skill coverage, and statistical charting.

title: Act VI Dragons: Bahamoth & Dragon Knight
summary: Act 6 Dragon's Reach expansion — new zones, boss encounters, and the Dragon Knight unlock chain.

title: Deferred Resolution & Feature Completion
summary: Blacksmith merge, UI overhaul, combat rebalance, simulation parity, and the new survey tool.

title: Emberveil Design Foundations
summary: The original design document — party-based RPG with mobile-first combat and an atmospheric dark-fantasy world.
